scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send: SUBSCRIBE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 SIP/2.0 Accept: application/watcherinfo+xml Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 SUBSCRIBE Expires: 1800 From: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Content-Length: 0 Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: Sipp v1.1-TLS, version 20061124 Allow: INVITE,ACK,CANCEL,OPTIONS,BYE,REFER,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,SUBSCRIBE,INFO
